'''halatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oestrone|oestrone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oestrone|oestrone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| halatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hælæthæth|hælæthæth]] || [[word:hælæthæj|hælæthæj]] || [[word:hælæthæsh|hælæthæsh]] || [[word:hælæthæ|hælæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:halalathath|halalathath]] || [[word:halalathaj|halalathaj]] || [[word:halalathash|halalathash]] || [[word:halalatha|halalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:halathath|halathath]] || [[word:halathaj|halathaj]] || [[word:halathash|halathash]] || [[word:halatha|halatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:halafthath|halafthath]] || [[word:halafthaj|halafthaj]] || [[word:halafthash|halafthash]] || [[word:halafthaf|halafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:halathatha|halathatha]] || [[word:halathaja|halathaja]] || [[word:halathasha|halathasha]] || [[word:halathaka|halathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:halathath|halathath]] || [[word:halathaj|halathaj]] || [[word:halathash|halathash]] || [[word:halatha|halatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:halathathal|halathathal]] || [[word:halathajal|halathajal]] || [[word:halathashal|halathashal]] || [[word:halathakal|halathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:halathathatha|halathathatha]] || [[word:halathajaja|halathajaja]] || [[word:halathashasha|halathashasha]] || [[word:halathaka|halathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:halathathan|halathathan]] || [[word:halathajan|halathajan]] || [[word:halathashan|halathashan]] || [[word:halathakan|halathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:halathathaoro|halathathaoro]] || [[word:halathajaoro|halathajaoro]] || [[word:halathashaoro|halathashaoro]] || [[word:halathakaoro|halathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
